: Four-tier memory architecture for the DQ Chatbot â€” all Databricks-native, zero extra infrastructure.
: LangGraph manages in-process working memory; Memory Manager loads/saves session turns to Delta;
compaction snapshots to UC Volume after 10 turns; rule suggestion cache in Delta (adequate for small user base).
: Persistent conversation context across turns and sessions; personalised suggestions per user;
no lost context on browser refresh; zero idle memory cost.
: Session resume latency <200ms | cache hit rate >30% for repeat queries |
compaction triggers at 10 turns (60% context token reduction).
